creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: johans
Date: Sat Dec 28 09:10:11 2013
New Revision: 337842
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/337842

Log:
  - Correct dependencies [1,2]
  - Update to FreeCiv 2.4.1 [3]
  
  PR:		ports/185235 [2]
  Submitted by:	Alexandr Matveev <timon@timon.net.nz> [1], John Marino <freebsd@marino.st> [2]

Modified:
  head/games/freeciv/Makefile
  head/games/freeciv/distinfo
  head/games/freeciv/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/freeciv/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/freeciv/Makefile	Sat Dec 28 06:59:23 2013	(r337841)
+++ head/games/freeciv/Makefile	Sat Dec 28 09:10:11 2013	(r337842)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	freeciv
-PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/freeciv/Freeciv%20${PORTVERSION:R}/${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -11,10 +10,13 @@ MAINTAINER=	johans@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Free turn-based multiplayer strategy
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	hicolor-icon-theme>=0:${PORTSDIR}/misc/hicolor-icon-theme
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libcurl.so:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
 
 USES=		gettext gmake iconv pkgconfig
+USE_SQLITE=	yes
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libltdl
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
@@ -34,7 +36,6 @@ IGNORE=		cannot use SDL without X11: re-
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MX11}
 LIB_DEPENDS+=	libtiff.so:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/tiff \
 		libpng15.so:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png \
-		libcurl.so:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl \
 		libggz.so:${PORTSDIR}/games/libggz \
 		libggz-gtk.so:${PORTSDIR}/games/ggz-gtk-client \
 		libggzcore.so:${PORTSDIR}/games/ggz-client-libs \
@@ -42,7 +43,6 @@ LIB_DEPENDS+=	libtiff.so:${PORTSDIR}/gra
 USE_XORG=	xpm
 USE_SDL=	mixer
 USE_GNOME=	gtk20
-USE_SQLITE=	yes
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-client=gtk
 CONFLICTS=	freeciv-nox11-[0-9]*

Modified: head/games/freeciv/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/freeciv/distinfo	Sat Dec 28 06:59:23 2013	(r337841)
+++ head/games/freeciv/distinfo	Sat Dec 28 09:10:11 2013	(r337842)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (freeciv-2.4.0.tar.bz2) = 7b2a9e6f777d2ac62bad9378dd7d03e4be07527c89d892b8f12b6b18fd0d80ad
-SIZE (freeciv-2.4.0.tar.bz2) = 38221472
+SHA256 (freeciv-2.4.1.tar.bz2) = e8074e4c14b69fc23d6956084524a5f42dbbe4620196ffa8b612135af35bef80
+SIZE (freeciv-2.4.1.tar.bz2) = 38186597

-share/applications/freeciv-modpack.desktop

 %%X11%%%%DATADIR%%/amplio2/ancientcities.png
 %%X11%%%%DATADIR%%/amplio2/ancientcities.spec
 %%X11%%%%DATADIR%%/amplio2/explosions.png
@@ -3210,19 +3239,19 @@ share/applications/freeciv-modpack.deskt
 %%X11%%%%DATADIR%%/wonders/united_nations.png
 %%X11%%%%DATADIR%%/wonders/womens_suffrage.png
 %%X11%%share/icons/hicolor/128x128/apps/freeciv-client.png
+%%X11%%share/icons/hicolor/128x128/apps/freeciv-modpack.png
 %%X11%%share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/freeciv-client.png

-share/icons/hicolor/128x128/apps/freeciv-modpack.png

 %%NLS%%share/locale/ar/LC_MESSAGES/freeciv.mo
 %%NLS%%share/locale/bg/LC_MESSAGES/freeciv.mo
@@ -3319,4 +3348,5 @@ share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps/freeciv-s
 @dirrmtry share/icons
 %%NLS%%@dirrm share/locale/gd/LC_MESSAGES
 %%NLS%%@dirrm share/locale/gd
